Obsidian Guide - LLM Full Context
Canonical site: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/
Version: 1.0.0
Last-Updated: 2026-03-06

Scope
- This file is a compact navigation and retrieval map for LLM indexing.
- Primary language of content: Russian.

Core pages
- Home: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/
- Quick Start: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/quick-start/
- Guide Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/guide/
- Sync Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/sync-hub/
- Methods Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/methods-hub/
- Plugins Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/plugins-hub/
- Articles Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/articles-hub/
- Resources Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/resources-hub/
- Obsidian Website Hub: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/obsidian-website-hub/

Task: Onboarding
1. https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/quick-start/
2. https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/first-notes/
3. https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/links/

Task: Authoring and structure
- https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/vault-structure/
- https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/markdown-tips/
- https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/tags/

Task: Operations
- https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/syncthing/
- https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/webdav/

Machine-readable endpoints
- Sitemap index: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/sitemap-index.xml
- Robots: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/robots.txt
- Search index: https://cookiespooky.github.io/obsidian-guide/search.json

Notes for indexing
- Keep slugs stable.
- Keep frontmatter complete (type, slug, title, description).
- Ensure canonical and base URL are correct in production.
